task: Type-3 DFIG external LVRT scaffold progress upload

uploaded_snapshot.contents: current 3IBR PSCAD project after external LVRT LOWV, IMMTRIP, CLEAR, and TIMER_S monitoring scaffold was added

VIBR1_2.source: P3 multimeter at Type-3 branch 22 kV collector-side upstream of BRK_DFIG

implemented_monitoring_scaffold.meaning: 1 when VIBR1_2 is at or below the immediate trip threshold region
1 when the low-voltage event is inactive; used to clear the resettable integrator
continuous low-voltage event elapsed time in seconds

implemented_monitoring_scaffold.source: candidate/reset scaffold output from two selector stages
implemented_monitoring_scaffold.meaning: build-safe candidate/reset VSMIN scaffold output; not yet a validated latched minimum voltage
limitations: Feedback latch is still pending before this signal can be used for breaker trip logic.
A Feedback Loop Selector attempt produced a Build error indicating the source was connected to Unused, so that connection was removed.
Do not treat this signal as confirmed Vs_min_latched until a feedback/latch structure is redesigned and verified.

build_check.note: Latest manual Build after adding DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_PU candidate/reset scaffold showed 0 red errors. This confirms static Build safety only, not final VSMIN latch correctness.

safety_notes: The scaffold is monitoring-only and does not command BRK_DFIG.
DFIG_LVRT_VSMIN_PU is currently a candidate/reset scaffold output, not a validated latched minimum voltage.
No actual PSCAD LVRT trip has been implemented yet.
Future BRK_DFIG command synthesis must preserve the confirmed 0=closed, 1=open semantics.
recommended_next_steps: Run a 5 s no-fault baseline to verify LOWV, IMMTRIP, TIMER_S, CLEAR, and VSMIN candidate outputs.
Redesign and verify the Vs_min_latched feedback/latch structure before using it in trip logic.
Add tVRT calculation and duration_exceeded comparator only after Vs_min_latched is stable.
Add trip_latch monitoring before connecting any breaker command.
Only after monitoring validation should BRK_DFIG command synthesis be discussed.
